abilities.description: Throws down a smoke bomb, silencing enemies. Enemies attacking from the smoke or attacking allies within the smoke have a chance to miss their attacks.
abilities.name: Smoke Screen
abilities.story: Since his escape during the night of his betrayal, Riki has valued the use of a simple smoke screen to confuse his opponents.

abilities.description: Teleports behind the target unit, momentarily slowing them and striking for bonus damage if it is an enemy.
abilities.name: Blink Strike
abilities.story: The Stealth Assassin's agile movement makes him impossible to escape.

abilities.description: Riki phases out of the world while striking random enemy units from behind in an area around him.
abilities.name: Tricks of the Trade
abilities.story: The Stealth Assassin is not afraid to fight dirty, and specializes in attacking his opponents from behind.

abilities.description: Riki fades into the shadows, becoming invisible. Every time Riki strikes his enemy from behind, he deals bonus damage based on his Agility. When Riki attacks, he becomes visible. Grants bonus experience for hero kills and assists.
abilities.name: Cloak and Dagger

description: Remains permanently invisible until the moment to strike. Leaving his past life behind, Riki escaped the royal grounds using his own Cloak-and-Dagger methods. Stealthy and fond of killing from behind, Riki throws down a dense Smoke Screen, blinding and choking foes as he takes them by surprise with Blink Strike. Intruders who enter his turf is greeted with twin daggers, flashes of steel that slash simultaneously at every turned back while the master himself remains unseen. How this feat is accomplished remains a mystery, for the Stealth Assassin is not one to divulge his Tricks of the Trade.  Carry Escape Disabler  Bearded, Blue, Horns, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: In DotA, Riki was named "Rikimaru" (力丸), a reference to one of the main characters in the Tenchu video game series. The name is carried over to Riki's official Chinese hero name.

hero_talents.talent_left: Tricks of the Trade Applies a Basic Dispel

hero_talents.talent_right: +30% Tricks of the Trade Agility Increase
